title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!
